_note: Married-in spouses lacking a parsed year (batch undated_4) given their DOCUMENTED parents + full siblings. 31 of 45 filled; 14 skipped as genuinely undocumented (see below). NEW nodes use the SPJ_ prefix. Two fills REFERENCE existing parents rather than duplicate them: (a) ELISHEBA, 'daughter of Amminadab, sister of Nahshon' (Exodus 6:23), is appended as a child of the EXISTING AMMINADAB + AMMINADABW union (Nahshon already hangs there — not re-added); (b) ARSINOE1 (Arsinoe I of Egypt) is given a birth-union under the EXISTING MAC_LYSIMACHUS with a NEW mother node (Nicaea of Macedon) — Lysimachus' existing placeholder-wife union is left alone since Arsinoe's mother was specifically Nicaea. CROSS-LINK: CUNIGUNDE of Luxembourg and OGIVE of Luxembourg are made real kin — Siegfried of Luxembourg + Hedwig of Nordgau parent Cunigunde AND Frederick 'in the Moselgau', and Frederick + Ermentrude of Gleiberg in turn parent Ogive; so the shared node SPJ_FREDERICK_LUX is a child in Siegfried's union and a parent in Ogive's. Unknown mothers are '—' placeholders per the union-needs-2-parents rule. Web-verified July 2026 against Wikipedia (and, for the pseudepigraphal fills, the Book of Jubilees text): 'Matthew Stewart, 4th Earl of Lennox', 'Ralph Neville, 1st Earl of Westmorland', 'Joan, Countess of Ponthieu', 'Aenor de Chatellerault', 'Cunigunde of Luxembourg', 'Elizabeth de Burgh', 'Mary of Guelders', 'Henry of Grosmont', 'Elizabeth Mure', 'Bonne of Luxembourg', 'Arsinoe I of Egypt', 'Marjorie, Countess of Carrick', 'Aelfflaed', 'Zipporah', 'Lucrezia Tornabuoni', 'Philip the Good', 'Ingegerd Olofsdotter of Sweden', 'Charles, Duke of Orleans', 'Adela of Champagne', 'Ogive of Luxembourg', 'Margaret Wake', 'Beatrice I, Countess of Burgundy', 'Rogneda of Polotsk', 'Robert de Brus, 6th Lord of Annandale', 'Bertha of Savoy', 'Alfonsina Orsini', 'Sohaemus of Emesa', 'John Doukas (Caesar)/Irene Pegonitissa'. SKIPPED (undocumented parentage, no fabrication): DUNCW (Duncan I's wife, name uncertain, no source parentage); ARISTOBULUS2W (wife unnamed); LAMECHADAH (Adah, wife of Lamech — Genesis 4 names no parents); MALCIW (Malcolm I's wife unrecorded); MATTATHIASW (wife unnamed); HAMW (Ne'elatamauk — Jubilees names her but gives NO father); BILHAH (no canonical parentage; Jubilees' 'Rotheus' inconsistent/marginal); AGA (Agatha, wife of Edward the Exile — parentage famously disputed, no consensus); ANTIOCHUS4W (wife unnamed here); MARYCLOPAS (no documented parentage); EALD (Ealdgyth, widow of Sigeferth — own parentage unknown); JUDITHBAV (DATA ISSUE — this single node is married to BOTH Louis the Pious (d.843) AND Frederick II Duke of Swabia (d.1147): two different women named Judith of Bavaria three centuries apart, conflated; cannot assign one parentage); SIMONTHASSIW (wife unnamed); VANOZZA (Vannozza dei Cattanei — parentage undocumented).
